applications.name: google-workspace-cli
applications.description: Plugin-source wrapper that vendors only Google Workspace CLI upstream skills for Claude and Codex marketplaces.

upstream.policy: Vendor only googleworkspace/cli/skills, not the full upstream repository.

claude_manifest.description: Claude plugin manifest for this whole-repo plugin source.

codex_manifest.description: Codex plugin manifest for this whole-repo plugin source.

skills.description: Vendored Google Workspace CLI skill directories copied from upstream googleworkspace/cli/skills.

sync_workflow.description: GitHub Actions workflow that sparse-checks out upstream skills, replaces local skills/, validates plugin shape, and opens a refresh pull request.

design_doc.description: Design for vendoring only Google Workspace CLI skills into this plugin-source wrapper.

implementation_plan.description: Implementation plan for sparse-syncing upstream Google Workspace CLI skills.

scripts.description: Repository helper scripts, including setup-worktree.sh for sibling worktree preparation.

key_directories..github/workflows/: Repository automation, including upstream skill sync

conventions.upstream_sync: Use .github/workflows/sync-upstream-skills.yml to refresh skills from googleworkspace/cli/skills
conventions.runtime_requirement: Users must install and authenticate gws in their own environment for live Google Workspace operations
conventions.marketplace_model: Claude and Codex marketplaces can point to this repository as a whole-repo plugin source
conventions.worktrees: Use sibling worktrees at ../worktrees/<branch-name> unless the user explicitly requests work in the main checkout

notes_for_agents.startup: Read this file before exploring the repository. It is the primary startup context for structure, ownership, sync workflow, docs, and validation commands.
notes_for_agents.update_repo_map: Refresh this file whenever manifests, sync workflow, docs, validation commands, or skill layout change.
notes_for_agents.sync_scope: This repository owns packaging metadata and sync automation; upstream owns the vendored skill bodies.
